name: Venison Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir sausage, onion, and garlic salt in a 10-inch skillet until the sausage is light brown. Drain.
2. Add tomatoes (with liquid), tomato sauce, 2 tablespoons parsley, sugar, basil, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and mushrooms. Heat to boil, stirring occasionally.
3. Reduce heat. Simmer uncovered until the mixture reaches the consistency of thick spaghetti sauce, about 1 hour.
4. Cook noodles as directed on the package. Reserve 1/2 cup of the sauce mixture.
5. Mix ricotta cheese, 1/4 cup Parmesan, 1 tablespoon parsley, 1 1/2 teaspoons salt, and oregano in a separate bowl.
6. Layer half of the noodles, remaining sauce mixture, mozzarella cheese, and ricotta cheese mixture in an ungreased oblong pan (10 x 6 x 2 inches).
7. Repeat the layering process until you have 2 layers.
8. Spoon the reserved sauce on top, then top with mozzarella and sprinkle with Parmesan.
9. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 45 minutes. Let stand 15 minutes.
